name: loading-indicator
title: Loading Indicator
description: A looping loading indicator with three styles — rotating arc, pulsing dots, and equalizer bars. Auto-starts on screen, zero dependencies.
usage:
let loader = LoadingIndicator()
view.addSubview(loader)
loader.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
    loader.centerXAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerXAnchor),
    loader.centerYAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.centerYAnchor),
])

variants.title: Arc
variants.description: A single rotating stroked arc. The default.
